description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:alpine Docker image. Define three stages: setup, build, and test. Add a setup job named setup that runs `yarn install` in the setup stage. Add a build job named build in the build stage that runs `npm run build`, caches the `node_modules/` directory, and archives the `dist/` directory as an artifact that expires in 1 week. Add a test job named test in the test stage that depends on the build job and runs `npm run test`.
